# Cinematen.be — llms.txt
# Site for AI search engines to understand this website

> Cinematen.be is a Belgian film and TV review and news website in Dutch. Founded by Yorrick and Maarten. We write reviews, news articles, and host a film & TV podcast.

## About
- Language: Dutch (nl-BE)
- Topics: film reviews, TV series reviews, movie news, streaming news, trailers, casting news
- Authors: Yorrick Schoonheydt, Maarten
- Podcast: Cinematen Podcast (Spotify, Apple Podcasts)

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://www.cinematen.be/
- Nieuws (News): https://www.cinematen.be/nieuws/pages/1
- Reviews & Blogs: https://www.cinematen.be/reviews&blogs/pages/1
- Film nieuws: https://www.cinematen.be/nieuws/film/
- Serie nieuws: https://www.cinematen.be/nieuws/serie/
- Podcast: https://www.cinematen.be/luister/

## Content Policy
- All content is original, written in Dutch
- News articles cover international film and TV industry
- Reviews include star ratings (0-5 scale)
- No auto-generated content

## Contact
- Email: hello@cinematen.be
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/cinematen_podcast
